user_query: The worker reads env.MODEL_API_KEY at startup in apps/worker/src/config.ts, but this secret is not declared in wrangler.toml under [vars] or as a secret. When deployed, the binding is undefined and the worker crashes on the first request. Add MODEL_API_KEY to the wrangler.toml as a secret reference using the [secrets] section convention and add a startup check that throws a descriptive error if the value is missing at runtime.
